items.retrieval_query: greet customer politely, say hello, good morning, good afternoon

items.expected_agent_utterance: I am _____ from adventure team on Mahindra & Mahindra
items.retrieval_query: introduce yourself and your team, say who you are and your team

items.item_text: Explain the purpose and duration of the call
items.expected_agent_utterance: We are conducting a short feedback exercise to understand customer preferences for Adventure experiences. This will help us improve future events. The call will take about 8–10 minutes. Your responses will be kept confidential and used only for analysis purposes.
items.retrieval_query: explain call purpose and duration, mention feedback or survey and time needed
ask customer their age, how old are you, may I know your age
items.condition_source_item_hint: Sir/Mam, we would start with your basic info, Age

items.retrieval_query: ask customer about their profession or job
items.condition_source_item_hint: Sir/Mam, we would start with your basic info, Profession

items.item_text: Ask how many people are in the customer's family
items.expected_agent_utterance: How many people are there in your family?
items.retrieval_query: ask how many people are in your family, family size
items.condition_source_item_hint: Sir/Mam, we would start with your basic info, How many people are there in your family

items.item_text: Ask which vehicle or vehicles the customer owns
items.expected_agent_utterance: Which vehicle or vehicles do you own?
items.retrieval_query: ask which vehicle or vehicles you own
items.condition_source_item_hint: Sir/Mam, we would start with your basic info, Which vehicle/vehicles do you own?

items.item_text: Ask when the customer last took part in an Adventure activity and which event
items.expected_agent_utterance: When was the last time you took part in a Mahindra Adventure activity? And which event was it?
items.retrieval_query: ask when last participated in adventure activity and which event
items.condition_source_item_hint: When was the last time you took part in a Mahindra Adventure activity? And which event was it?

items.item_text: Ask how the customer first heard about the event
items.expected_agent_utterance: How did you first hear about this event?
items.retrieval_query: ask how you first heard about this event, source of awareness
items.condition_source_item_hint: How did you first hear about this event?

items.item_text: Ask what made the customer interested enough to subscribe or book the event
items.expected_agent_utterance: What made you feel interested enough to subscribe or book this Adventure event?
items.retrieval_query: ask what made you interested to subscribe or book the event
items.condition_source_item_hint: What made you feel interested enough to subscribe/book this Adventure event?

items.item_text: Ask if the customer checked out any other outdoor experiences before booking
items.expected_agent_utterance: Before booking Mahindra Adventure, did you check out any other outdoor experiences? Yes or No?
items.retrieval_query: ask if you checked other outdoor experiences before booking
items.condition_source_item_hint: Before booking Mahindra Adventure, did you check out any other outdoor experiences? (Yes/No)

items.item_text: If Yes, ask which other outdoor experiences the customer looked at
items.expected_agent_utterance: Which other outdoor experiences did you look at?
items.retrieval_query: ask which other outdoor experiences you looked at
items.condition_text: If customer answered Yes to checking other outdoor experiences
items.condition_source_item_hint: Before booking Mahindra Adventure, did you check out any other outdoor experiences? Yes or No?

items.item_text: If Yes, ask where the customer heard about these other outdoor events
items.expected_agent_utterance: Where did you hear about these other outdoor events?
items.retrieval_query: ask where you heard about these other outdoor events
items.condition_text: If customer answered Yes to checking other outdoor experiences
items.condition_source_item_hint: Before booking Mahindra Adventure, did you check out any other outdoor experiences? Yes or No?

items.item_text: Ask who influenced the customer's decision the most while exploring and deciding
items.expected_agent_utterance: While you were exploring and deciding, who influenced your decision the most? Was it you, your spouse, kids, friends, or someone else?
items.retrieval_query: ask who influenced your decision most, you, spouse, kids, friends
items.condition_source_item_hint: While you were exploring and deciding, who influenced your decision the most?

items.item_text: Ask how early the customer expects to be informed before an adventure event
items.expected_agent_utterance: According to you, how early should we inform you before an adventure event?
items.retrieval_query: ask how early you expect to be informed before an adventure event
items.condition_source_item_hint: According to you, how early should we inform you before an adventure event?

items.item_text: Ask how long ago the customer last subscribed
items.expected_agent_utterance: How long ago did you last subscribe to our adventure events? Was it less than 1 week, 1 to 2 weeks, 2 to 4 weeks, 1 to 2 months, or more than 2 months?
items.retrieval_query: ask how long ago you last subscribed to adventure events

items.item_text: Ask what would make the customer more likely to subscribe again
items.expected_agent_utterance: What is the one thing that would make you more likely to subscribe to our adventure events in the future again?
items.expected_intent: Identify factors to increase subscription likelihood
items.retrieval_query: ask what would make you more likely to subscribe again
